description: Composition Blue running shorts for men made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has an attached innerwear, elasticated waistband with a drawstring and swoosh logo in a reflective material towards the left hemline Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry on low Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Built for breathable comfort and with the zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, this pair of nike running shorts comes in a simple design with blue accents. These high-performance shorts created from Dri-Fit fabric wick sweat away from the body and keeps you cool, dry and comfortable. Team them with tees and running shoes.
